Feature Page

# FIRE Comparison Mode

Compare FIRE paths, assumptions, and trade-offs in one view instead of relying on a single static answer.

Fire Path is built to make planning decisions clearer by showing how different paths and assumptions reshape the outcome.

[Go to the tool page](https://www.fire-path.app/tools/fire-calculator) [Read the methodology](https://www.fire-path.app/methodology)

![](https://www.fire-path.app/_next/image?url=%2Fstatic%2Fimages%2Fproduct%2Fmockup.png&w=3840&q=75)

![Fire Path comparison mode screen](https://www.fire-path.app/_next/image?url=%2Fstatic%2Fimages%2Fproduct%2Fen%2F02.png&w=3840&q=75)

## Why this feature matters

- • Compare six FIRE strategies and scenario variations
- • See timeline and target differences more clearly
- • Reduce overconfidence in one headline result

## Best-fit use cases

- • Users comparing Lean, Regular, and Fat FIRE
- • People stress-testing spending or contribution assumptions
- • Anyone who wants a decision tool instead of a one-shot calculator

[![Fire Path](https://www.fire-path.app/_next/image?url=%2Fstatic%2Fimages%2Flogo.png&w=64&q=75)Fire Path](https://www.fire-path.app/)

Your path to financial independence
